requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and INTECO Conformity as International Baseline for Costa Rica BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和INTECO合规作为哥斯达黎加BESS的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和INTECO合規作為哥斯大黎加BESS的國際基準

summary.en: Costa Rica does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation, Chile's SEC lithium battery certification, or a mandatory pre-market IEC 62619 certification regime enforced by a national authority. INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica) is Costa Rica's national standards body and adopts IEC standards; INTECO adopts IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as voluntary national standards under the INTECO normative catalogue, but mandatory pre-shipment market-access enforcement of these specific standards for stationary BESS had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 (Secondary Cells and Batteries Containing Alkaline or Other Non-Acid Electrolytes — Safety Requirements) are the internationally expected safety standards for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Costa Rican project owners, EPCs, ICE, and ARESEP-regulated operators are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite in project specifications and interconnection agreements. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) is expected at the system level. Exporters should verify the current INTECO/MEIC regulatory scope with INTECO and the Ministerio de Economía, Industria y Comercio (MEIC) before shipment.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》、智利SEC锂电池认证或国家机关强制执行的强制性上市前IEC 62619认证制度相当。INTECO（哥斯达黎加技术标准研究所）是哥斯达黎加国家标准机构，采用IEC标准；INTECO以自愿性国家标准形式在其标准目录下采纳IEC 62619和IEC 62133，但截至本数据集日期，这些特定标准对固定式BESS强制性装运前市场准入执法尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质二次电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，哥斯达黎加项目业主、EPC承包商、ICE和ARESEP监管运营商预计将以IEC 62619合规作为项目规格和互联协议中的技术前提。系统级预计采用IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）。出口商在出货前应向INTECO和经济工业商务部（MEIC）核实现行INTECO/MEIC监管范围。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》、智利SEC鋰電池認證或國家機關強制執行的強制性上市前IEC 62619認證制度相當。INTECO（哥斯大黎加技術標準研究所）是哥斯大黎加國家標準機構，採用IEC標準；INTECO以自願性國家標準形式在其標準目錄下採納IEC 62619和IEC 62133，但截至本數據集日期，這些特定標準對固定式BESS強制性裝運前市場准入執法尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質二次電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，哥斯大黎加項目業主、EPC承包商、ICE和ARESEP監管運營商預計將以IEC 62619合規作為項目規格和互聯協議中的技術前提。系統級預計採用IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）。出口商在出貨前應向INTECO和經濟工業商務部（MEIC）核實現行INTECO/MEIC監管範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; adopted by INTECO as voluntary national standard)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Secondary Cells and Batteries Containing Alkaline or Other Non-Acid Electrolytes — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (adopted by INTECO; applicable scope varies by cell format)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica (national standards body; IEC adopting member — verify mandatory vs voluntary scope for BESS with INTECO and MEIC)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in Costa Rican project specifications or INTECO conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance before supplying BESS cells and modules to Costa Rica projects.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被哥斯达黎加项目规格或INTECO合格评定接受为等效依据。出口商在向哥斯达黎加项目供应BESS电芯和模组前，须除中国GB合规外另从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被哥斯大黎加項目規格或INTECO合格評定接受為等效依據。出口商在向哥斯大黎加項目供應BESS電芯和模組前，須除中國GB合規外另從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Costa Rican project owners, ICE, and ARESEP-regulated operators reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or INTECO conformity assessment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current mandatory versus voluntary INTECO/MEIC regulatory scope for BESS cells and modules with INTECO and MEIC before shipment to confirm whether any pre-shipment conformity obligation exists; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Costa Rica BESS projects; (c) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 evidence at the system level where required by the project owner or interconnection agreement; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：哥斯达黎加项目业主、ICE和ARESEP监管运营商将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或INTECO合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）在出货前向INTECO和MEIC核实BESS电芯和模组当前强制性与自愿性INTECO/MEIC监管范围，确认是否存在任何装运前合规义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至哥斯达黎加BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在项目业主或互联协议要求的情况下，在系统层面取得IEC 62933-5-2证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：哥斯大黎加項目業主、ICE和ARESEP監管運營商將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或INTECO合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）在出貨前向INTECO和MEIC核實BESS電芯和模組當前強制性與自願性INTECO/MEIC監管範圍，確認是否存在任何裝運前合規義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至哥斯大黎加BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在項目業主或互聯協議要求的情況下，在系統層面取得IEC 62933-5-2證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ICE, ARESEP, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; INTECO/MEIC mandatory pre-market regulatory obligation for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with INTECO and MEIC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica (national standards body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation enforced at market entry has been identified for Costa Rica as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Costa Rican project specifications and ICE/ARESEP interconnection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Costa Rica project acceptance. Verify the current INTECO/MEIC mandatory regulatory scope for BESS and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, ICE/relevant distributor, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，哥斯达黎加尚无经确认的在市场准入时执行的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是哥斯达黎加项目规格和ICE/ARESEP互联协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足哥斯达黎加项目验收要求。出货前请核实BESS当前INTECO/MEIC强制性监管范围，并向项目业主、ICE/相关配电商及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，哥斯大黎加尚無經確認的在市場准入時執行的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是哥斯大黎加項目規格和ICE/ARESEP互聯協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足哥斯大黎加項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實BESS當前INTECO/MEIC強制性監管範圍，並向項目業主、ICE/相關配電商及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
